industrial_automation.name: Industrial Automation
industrial_automation.description: Session research that upgrades planetary logistics and unlocks higher-output extractors.

orbital_logistics.name: Orbital Logistics
orbital_logistics.description: Standardizes dropship operations and makes fleets faster across the session map.

siege_doctrine.name: Siege Doctrine
siege_doctrine.description: Advanced assault calculations for long-range siege lances.

fortified_infrastructure.name: Fortified Infrastructure
fortified_infrastructure.description: Session doctrine for hardened frontier worlds and formal fortress construction.

microelectronics_fabrication.name: Microelectronics Fabrication
microelectronics_fabrication.description: Cleanroom doctrine that unlocks orbital fabs turning energy and metal into microelectronics.

ai_stewardship.name: Steward Protocol
ai_stewardship.description: Command-automation doctrine: delegate your seat to a trusted AI while you are offline (asleep). It holds the line on a chosen posture and hands control back at a set time. Powerful — so it is gated behind choosing the command leader and only opens mid-session.
